items.name: ♛｜EROS Glacé (Iced Watch) | 1.0
items.description:
➢ This watch has functional diamonds that reflect and refract light ingame.

You can buy a watch on Roblox for exactly 100 Robux. This EROS watch is just 70 Robux. Another watch may look just fine, and it's enough for most people. You aren't most people. You want the best. You want over 3 months of design, 250+ hours of assembly and craftsmanship like no other. Pause. This isn't just a UGC. It's a symbol. Of your status, your taste, your class! Remember that girl? Don't you want to impress her? You need an EROS watch. You need THIS watch.

Our cheapest watch looks better than your most expensive. Time for an upgrade?


Designed in Italy by EROS. View the collection: https://www.roblox.com/groups/16182632/E-R-O-S#!/about

items.name: Cheetah Leopard Rhinestone Silver 2000s Necklace
items.description:
Pink Zebra Version = https://www.roblox.com/catalog/91911233808745
(More Cute UGC's in my Group)
Unleash your wild side with the Cheetah Leopard Rhinestone Silver 2000s Necklace! This eye-catching accessory blends bold animal print with shimmering rhinestones for that signature Y2K glam. The silver-tone chain holds a fierce cheetah and leopard print charm, adorned with sparkling rhinestones that add a touch of McBling luxury. Perfect for anyone who loves the edgy, bold style of the early 2000s, this necklace will add a fun, statement-making flair to any outfit. Embrace your inner trendsetter and rock this throwback accessory with confidence!
